title: Little Tractor
description: A dyeable tractor that harvests and replants crops!
body:
# Little Tractor

A small mod that adds a crop-harvesting tractor. The tractor can be dyed with any of the 16 dye colors, and can be picked up. Pick up & replant crops in an easier, more efficient manner with the Little Tractor!


Originally created for the SWEMY Minecraft server. Free to use for any server!


## Controls

Shift + Right Click: Open Tractor Inventory 

Space (whilst riding): Toggle Modes

Shift + Right Click (+ Dye): Dye Tractor
